topic: AI food assistant Amara — your personal guide to African cuisine in Dubai

telegram.hook: 🌍 Not sure which African spice to use? Meet Amara — the AI guide inside Heaven of Africa Store.
telegram.main_text:
Heaven of Africa is Dubai's dedicated African food store, stocked with 200+ products sourced from 30+ countries across the continent. From West African egusi and red palm oil to Ethiopian berbere and North African pantry staples — everything is quality-inspected and stored in climate-controlled conditions.

What sets this store apart is Amara — an AI food assistant built right into the store experience. Amara can help you:
• Understand what a product is and how to use it
• Get recipe ideas for dishes like Jollof Rice, Egusi Soup or Suya
• Find the right ingredient substitution
• Learn the cultural origins of what you're cooking

Not sure where to start? You can book a 45-minute in-store consultation — free tasting included for first-time visitors, plus take-home recipe cards.

Delivery across Dubai is coming soon. For now, the store is open in Al Quoz Industrial Area 3, Mon–Sat 9:00 AM – 8:00 PM, Sunday 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM.
telegram.product_focus: AI Assistant Amara — personalized guidance for every African ingredient in the catalog
telegram.call_to_action: Visit the store, explore the catalog, or book a free tasting consultation at heavenofafrica.ae
telegram.image_prompt: A warm, premium lifestyle photo inside a modern African food store in Dubai. Wooden shelves lined with neatly arranged jars of berbere spice, egusi seeds, red palm oil and plantain chips. A soft glowing tablet screen in the foreground displays a friendly AI assistant chat interface. Natural warm light, clean and uncluttered composition, rich earthy tones — terracotta, deep red, golden yellow. Professional food store photography aesthetic.

instagram.hook: Ever stood in front of a spice jar wondering what on earth to do with it? 🫙✨
instagram.caption:
That moment used to feel intimidating. Now it's the best part of the trip.

At Heaven of Africa Store in Dubai, every product comes with a secret weapon — Amara, an AI food assistant who knows African cuisine inside out.

Ask Amara what egusi actually tastes like. Ask for a Jollof Rice recipe. Ask what makes Ethiopian berbere different from your average chili blend. She'll guide you through 200+ products from 30+ African countries — no guesswork, no confusion.

The store is in Al Quoz Industrial Area 3. First-time visitors get a free tasting session and take-home recipe cards. Delivery is coming soon to Dubai.

African food is bold, layered and deeply rooted in culture. Amara helps you explore it with confidence. 🌍
instagram.visual_angle: Close-up flat lay of colorful African spices and ingredients — berbere, egusi seeds, bissap flowers, plantain chips — arranged on a warm terracotta surface. A smartphone beside them showing the Amara AI chat interface. Warm golden-hour light, rich textures, premium food photography feel.
instagram.call_to_action: Visit the store in Al Quoz or explore the catalog at heavenofafrica.ae
instagram.question: Which African ingredient have you always been curious about but never tried? 👇
instagram.image_prompt: A vibrant premium flat lay photo on a warm terracotta or linen surface. African pantry ingredients: a small bowl of egusi seeds, a jar of berbere spice blend, dried hibiscus flowers (bissap), golden plantain chips, and a bottle of red palm oil. Beside them, a smartphone with a minimal AI chat interface open. Warm natural side lighting, shallow depth of field, editorial food photography style. Rich earthy colors — deep red, golden yellow, burnt orange, forest green accents.
